name: the sufficiency threshold is configurable via --threshold
command: ID=P562S05; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-live.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --cache fc --threshold 4 --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z 2>e.err; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; grep -qE 'rule_count=5 sufficiency=ok' e.err && echo threshold-configurable 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p fc && for i in $(seq 1 5); do echo "Vue guideline $i."; done > fc/vuejs-style-guide.txt
